goal: Prepare governed-live AI Entry activation without enabling live calls

activation_preconditions.name: provider_adapter_authority_gate
activation_preconditions.description: Provider adapters must remain non-authoritative until a governed activation decision exists.

activation_preconditions.name: sdk_access_authority_gate
activation_preconditions.description: SDK access guidance must not imply access grant or credential availability.

activation_preconditions.name: receipt_capture_path
activation_preconditions.description: Preview receipts must remain placeholders until a governed receipt issuer exists.

activation_preconditions.name: execution_authority_boundary
activation_preconditions.description: Execution authority must be issued only through a separate governed decision path.

activation_preconditions.name: operator_recoverability_boundary
activation_preconditions.description: Activation must preserve fail-closed recovery if operator authority or external adapter state degrades.

next_build_targets: activation status surface for Ecosystem Chat & LLM
